%# Foodsecurity DAG - Loop 25, Retry Budget 5
%python main.py dags/foodsecurity/foodsecurity.yaml --model groq/llama-3.1-8b-instant --loop 25 --loop-retry-max 5 --label "foo_llama31_25_5"
%python main.py dags/foodsecurity/foodsecurity.yaml --model groq/llama-3.3-70b-versatile --loop 25 --loop-retry-max 5 --label "foo_llama33_25_5"
%python main.py dags/foodsecurity/foodsecurity.yaml --model google/gemini-2.5-flash --loop 25 --loop-retry-max 5 --label "foo_gemini25_25_5"

%# Algal2 DAG - Loop 25, Retry Budget 5
%python main.py dags/algal2/algal2.yaml --model groq/llama-3.1-8b-instant --loop 25 --loop-retry-max 5 --label "alg_llama31_25_5"
%python main.py dags/algal2/algal2.yaml --model groq/llama-3.3-70b-versatile --loop 25 --loop-retry-max 5 --label "alg_llama33_25_5"
%python main.py dags/algal2/algal2.yaml --model google/gemini-2.5-flash --loop 25 --loop-retry-max 5 --label "alg_gemini25_25_5"

%# Lexical DAG - Loop 25, Retry Budget 5
%python main.py dags/lexical/lexical.yaml --model groq/llama-3.1-8b-instant --loop 25 --loop-retry-max 5 --label "lex_llama31_25_5"
%python main.py dags/lexical/lexical.yaml --model groq/llama-3.3-70b-versatile --loop 25 --loop-retry-max 5 --label "lex_llama33_25_5"
%python main.py dags/lexical/lexical.yaml --model google/gemini-2.5-flash --loop 25 --loop-retry-max 5 --label "lex_gemini25_25_5"

%# Liquefaction DAG - Loop 25, Retry Budget 5
%python main.py dags/liquefaction/liquefaction.yaml --model groq/llama-3.1-8b-instant --loop 25 --loop-retry-max 5 --label "liq_llama31_25_5"
%python main.py dags/liquefaction/liquefaction.yaml --model groq/llama-3.3-70b-versatile --loop 25 --loop-retry-max 5 --label "liq_llama33_25_5"
%python main.py dags/liquefaction/liquefaction.yaml --model google/gemini-2.5-flash --loop 25 --loop-retry-max 5 --label "liq_gemini25_25_5"

%# Stocks DAG - Loop 25, Retry Budget 5
%python main.py dags/stocks/stocks.yaml --model groq/llama-3.1-8b-instant --loop 25 --loop-retry-max 5 --label "sto_llama31_25_5"
%python main.py dags/stocks/stocks.yaml --model groq/llama-3.3-70b-versatile --loop 25 --loop-retry-max 5 --label "sto_llama33_25_5"
%python main.py dags/stocks/stocks.yaml --model google/gemini-2.5-flash --loop 25 --loop-retry-max 5 --label "sto_gemini25_25_5"


%# ==================================================================================
%# COMMANDS TO RE-RUN INCOMPLETE/FAILED EXPERIMENTS
%# ==================================================================================

# Algal2 DAG - Llama 3.1 - NEEDS COMPLETE RE-RUN (0/25 successful)
python main.py dags/algal2/algal2.yaml --model groq/llama-3.1-8b-instant --loop 25 --loop-retry-max 5 --label "alg_llama31_25_5_rerun"

# Algal2 DAG - Llama 3.3 - NEEDS 1 MORE ITERATION (24/25 successful)
python main.py dags/algal2/algal2.yaml --model groq/llama-3.3-70b-versatile --loop 1 --loop-retry-max 5 --label "alg_llama33_25_5_補complete_retry"

# Lexical DAG - Gemini 2.5 - NEEDS 18 MORE ITERATIONS (7/25 successful)
python main.py dags/lexical/lexical.yaml --model google/gemini-2.5-flash --loop 18 --loop-retry-max 5 --label "lex_gemini25_25_5_complete"

# Liquefaction DAG - Gemini 2.5 - NEEDS 3 MORE ITERATIONS (22/25 successful)
python main.py dags/liquefaction/liquefaction.yaml --model google/gemini-2.5-flash --loop 3 --loop-retry-max 5 --label "liq_gemini25_25_5_complete"
